feed.title: Jakub Ledwoń
feed.subtitle: A minimal, responsive, and powerful Jekyll theme for presenting professional writing.

entry.title: Chess Clock
entry.summary: Project idea Chess Clock is my first side project that saw a daylight. I started building it for three main reasons: First of all I play chess from time to time and my friend and I needed a clock 😀. I wanted to explore Jetpack Compose. I was thinking about deploying my own app to the store for the long time and I finally did it. I can recommend it to everyone, having an app that can ser...
